docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-25-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PAMELA JOHNSON'S MOTION TO PAY IN INSTALLMENTS IS GRANTED. PAYMNTS ARE $15.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING 4/15/00 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER
